description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a prominent scope mounted on top, suggesting it is optimized for precision shooting. The body is composed of a mix of matte black and metallic gray finishes, with a robust fixed stock and an ergonomic pistol grip for stability and comfort. The barrel is long and fitted with a cylindrical suppressor at the muzzle, enhancing stealth capabilities. Multiple rails and attachments are visible, including a foregrip and additional optics or accessory mounts. The magazine is a detachable box type, positioned just ahead of the trigger guard. Overall, the rifle exudes a high-tech, urban combat aesthetic suitable for specialized operations.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a long barrel, suppressor, scope, and detachable box magazine, finished in matte black and metallic gray.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the scope, suppressor, fixed stock, and all major attachments.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the suppressor at the muzzle and the alignment of the scope and barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rifle's profile, scope, suppressor, and ergonomic grip.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock, pistol grip, and the back of the scope.
